seoTitle: How to Log In to Udemy Without OTP: Fix Login Issues
metaDescription: Troubleshoot Udemy login problems when the OTP step is getting in your way, with steps to check your credentials and recover access to your courses.
intro: Getting stuck at the OTP step when logging into Udemy can be frustrating, especially when you just want to get back into your courses. This walks through checking your credentials, recovering your account if needed, and steps to work around a stuck OTP requirement.

steps.heading: Double-check your login credentials
steps.body: Confirm you're entering the correct email and password before assuming the OTP step itself is the problem.

steps.heading: Try account recovery if you're locked out
steps.body: If your credentials aren't working, use Udemy's account recovery options to regain access.

steps.heading: Work through the OTP requirement
steps.body: If OTP is required, make sure you're checking the right email or phone for the code, and look for any alternate verification method Udemy offers.

steps.heading: Confirm you're back in and can access your courses
steps.body: Once logged in, verify your course library loads correctly so you know the issue is resolved.

faq.question: Why is Udemy asking me for an OTP in the first place?
faq.answer: OTP prompts are typically a security step to confirm it's really you logging in, especially from a new device or location.

faq.question: What if I'm not receiving the OTP code at all?
faq.answer: Check that you're monitoring the correct email or phone number tied to your account, since a mismatched contact method is a common cause.

faq.question: Can I permanently turn off OTP for future logins?
faq.answer: This depends on your account's security settings, so it's worth reviewing your account options if OTP prompts keep interrupting your logins.

faq.question: Is this different for personal accounts versus work-provided Udemy access?
faq.answer: Login troubleshooting is similar either way, though business-managed accounts may have additional verification steps set by an employer.
